reviews.comment:
Ayer pasé por esta estación de servicio 13/01/2020 , el empleado que nos atendió de muy mala forma , cuando le pedimos una indicación de la ruta nos trató como ignorantes, esto es para el dueño para vea qué clase de empleado tiene , hora exacta de mi factura es 19:26:21, una verdadera vergüenza,  jamás volveré a ese lugar

(Translated by Google)
Yesterday, January 13, 2020, I passed by this gas station. The employee who served us was very rude. When we asked for directions, he treated us like we were ignorant. This is for the owner to see what kind of employee he has. The exact time on my receipt is 7:26:21 PM. A real disgrace. I will never return to that place.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNNV9mUElREAE
